---
title: " "
description: |
  Projetos nos quais estou trabalhando.
listing:
  - id: ehr
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, description]
    contents: 
      - projeto01
      - projeto02
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
    
---



::: {#ehr}
:::
